purpose: An individual entry in the SideNavigation. Can be a top-level Navigation Item or a nested Child Item. Supports selected and expanded states.
whenToUse: As a child of SideNavigation only
For destinations that lead to a page or view
For grouping headers when used with hasChildren=true
doRules: Use Semibold Duplex for top-level items, Regular for sub-items
Indicate current page with Selected variant — 3px left bar + tinted bg
Show expand arrow when item has children
dontRules: Do not change text color via direct override — use Selected variant
Do not add custom corner radius — use sapButton_BorderCornerRadius (8px)

layoutGuidance.alignment: Icon left, label center, expand arrow right.

contentGuidance.labelLength: 1–3 words preferred; truncate with ellipsis if longer.

responsiveBehavior.S: Hidden by default; full layout in expanded menu

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Every nav item must have text or aria-label
Selected state communicated via background + left bar (not color alone)

exceptions: Child Item type for nested items
Two Click-Area variant when item has both navigation and expand
